query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_all FROM chatMessages WHERE userId = 'clovis_admin'; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_limit500 FROM (SELECT id FROM chatMessages WHERE userId = 'clovis_admin' ORDER BY createdAt LIMIT 500) t; SELECT MIN(id) as min_id, MAX(id) as max_id, MIN(createdAt) as oldest, MAX(createdAt) as newest FROM chatMessages WHERE userId = 'clovis_admin';
